title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.639 - Convention and sports complex fund, certain cities and counties may establish, purpose
text:
67.639.  Convention and sports complex fund, certain cities and counties may establish, purpose. — Each county and each city, as defined by section 67.638, is authorized to establish, by ordinance or order of the county or city governing body, a "Convention and Sports Complex Fund", for the purposes of developing, maintaining or operating within its jurisdiction, sports, convention, exhibition or trade facilities, which fund shall be separate from the general funds of such county or city, but which shall be subject to the provisions of the charter of such county or city.
(L. 1989 S.B. 295 & 312 § 2)
